prose.en: The organizational mission is understood and informs cybersecurity risk management
Share the organization's mission (e.g., through vision and mission statements, marketing, and service strategies) to provide a basis for identifying risks that may impede that mission

nist-withdrawal.label: ID.BE-02
nist-withdrawal.title: ID.BE-02
nist-withdrawal.prose: The organization’s place in critical infrastructure and its industry sector is identified and communicated

nist-withdrawal.label: ID.BE-03
nist-withdrawal.title: ID.BE-03
nist-withdrawal.prose: Priorities for organizational mission, objectives, and activities are established and communicated
